hero_subtitle: Sangam Herbals brings the living tradition of Ayurveda — its botanicals, rituals, and centuries of accumulated care — from the heart of India to homes around the world.
about_headline: Rooted in Tradition. Crafted for Today.
about_body: Founded under the direction of Dr. Praveen Rathi, Sangam Herbals draws its name from the confluence of sacred rivers — a symbol of union, purity, and purpose. Every remedy, oil, cosmetic, and aromatic blend in our range is prepared to classical Ayurvedic texts from real herbs and cold-pressed oils, with every ingredient listed openly and clearly labelled. From the soil of India to your doorstep worldwide, we carry nothing forward but the finest.

pillars.title: Authentic Ayurveda
pillars.body: Each formulation traces directly to classical Ayurvedic texts and is overseen by Dr. Praveen Rathi, preserving the integrity of ingredients, ratios, and intent that have defined this tradition for millennia.

pillars.title: Pure & Honest
pillars.body: Our products are made from real herbs and cold-pressed oils, with no needless fillers and the full ingredient list shown openly — so you can check exactly what you are buying.

pillars.title: India to Your Door
pillars.body: With cross-border delivery spanning the globe, Sangam Herbals delivers the warmth of Indian botanical heritage reliably, wherever you call home.

seo_title: Sangam Herbals — Authentic Ayurvedic Wellness, Worldwide
seo_description: Shop authentic Ayurvedic remedies, cosmetics, oils & aromatherapy from Sangam Herbals — prepared to classical texts, made in India, delivered worldwide.
